projectDescription: A general-purpose Node.js library for building Minecraft Classic servers with CPE support, providing extensible base classes for universes, levels, and players.
keyFeatures: Classic Protocol Extension (CPE) support for enhanced client features
Extensible base classes (BaseUniverse, BaseLevel, BasePlayer) for custom server logic
Multiple level management with per-universe level registry
Novel append-only block change persistence with optional keyframe snapshots
Per-client entity ID assignment via drone system
Watchdog client monitor for rate-limiting block operations
Interactive level command interpreter with undo-capable action recording
publicApiSurface: BaseUniverse — manages server lifecycle, players, and loaded levels
BaseHeartbeat — sends periodic heartbeats to ClassiCube server list
BasePlayer — handles player authentication, messaging, and block interactions
Watchdog — rate-limits player block operations to prevent abuse
BaseLevel — manages level state, blocks, players, drones, and persistence
BaseTemplate / EmptyTemplate — generates level block buffers from templates
BaseLevelCommandInterpreter — interprets and records interactive level commands
Drone — entity representation for players and NPCs in levels
DroneTransmitter — synchronizes drone positions to clients
ChangeRecord — append-only block change persistence with keyframe support
KeyframeRecord — SQLite-backed keyframe snapshots for fast level restoration
NullChangeRecord — no-op change record for ephemeral levels
